Instruction following.description: Honor constraints, formats, corrections, state, context, memory, relevance, and abstention.

Tool calling.description: Select tools, construct grounded arguments, run independent calls together, and stage dependent calls.

Error recovery.description: Recover from tool failures, partial results, retries, and idempotency hazards.

Clarification.description: Recognize missing information, ask only when required, and never invent parameters.

Building.description: Implement complete libraries, services, CLIs, workflows, and systems from specifications.

Debugging.description: Diagnose failures, repair defects, resolve compiler/runtime issues, and preserve regressions.

Project & integration.description: Coordinate multi-file, repository-scale, migration, and integration work.

Feature development.description: Extend working systems while preserving existing behavior.

Refactoring & performance.description: Restructure safely and improve measured performance without behavior drift.

Other verified work.description: Verified work not yet assigned to one of the primary programs.
